mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, delivery_no, order_no, area, warehouse_id, warehouse, customer_name, customer_address, appointment_date, appointment_time, item_summary, quantity, volume, weight, driver_name, driver_mobile, status, shipped_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_fulfillments (supplier_id, delivery_no, order_no, area, warehouse_id, warehouse, customer_name, customer_address, appointment_date, appointment_time, item_summary, quantity, volume, weight, driver_name, driver_mobile, status, shipped_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deliveryNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{area, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{warehouse, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appointmentDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{appointmentTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{volume, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{weight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{driverName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{driverMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shippedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_fulfillments (supplier_id, delivery_no, order_no, area, warehouse_id, warehouse, customer_name, customer_address, appointment_date, appointment_time, item_summary, quantity, volume, weight, driver_name, driver_mobile, status, shipped_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.deliveryNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.area, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.warehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.warehouse, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.customerAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appointmentDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.appointmentTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.itemSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.volume, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.weight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.driverName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.driverMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.shippedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_fulfillments WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM supplier_fulfillments WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_fulfillments SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE supplier_fulfillments SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_fulfillments WHERE order_no = #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status != 'deleted' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
